Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class ExtendedFormulas

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.ExtendedFormulas
public class ExtendedFormulas extends Object
Common implementation of some formula extensions for use in tests.

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ExtendedFormulas.AssociativeExpressionExtension
     
    private static class 
    ExtendedFormulas.CommonExtension
     
    static class 
    ExtendedFormulas.ExpressionExtension
    Implementation of a predicate extension which takes the form of a prefix symbol followed by two predicates and two expressions within parentheses.
    static class 
    ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension
    Implementation of a predicate extension which takes the form of a prefix symbol followed by two predicates and two expressions within parentheses.
    static class 
    ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension2

  • Field Details

    • old_fooS

      public static final IPredicateExtension old_fooS
      Old version of fooS with obsolescent interface.

    • fooS

      public static final IPredicateExtension2 fooS
      WD strict predicate extension with four children.

      Example: fooS(⊤, 1, ⊥, 2)

    • fooL

      public static final IPredicateExtension2 fooL
      Non WD strict (lazy) predicate extension with four children.

      Example: fooL(⊤, 1, ⊥, 2)

    • barS

      public static final IExpressionExtension barS
      WD strict expression extension with four children.

      Example: barS(⊤, 1, ⊥, 2)

    • barL

      public static final IExpressionExtension barL
      Non WD strict (lazy) expression extension with four children.

      Example: barL(⊤, 1, ⊥, 2)

    • asso

      public static final IExpressionExtension asso

    • EFF

      public static final FormulaFactory EFF
      Formula factory with the extensions described above.
